sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰορδάνης

- Transliteration: Iordanes

- Phonetic: ee-or-dan'-ace

- Definition: Jordan = "the descender"

1. the one river of Palestine, has its course of little more than 200 miles (300 km), from the roots of Anti-Lebanon to the head of the Dead Sea.

- Origin: of hebrew origin H3383

- TDNT entry: 16:08,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H3383]; the Jordanes (that is Jarden) a river of Palestine: - Jordan.
